[example span]{.defined_in_light-dark_base}

```{=html}
<!-- <link rel="stylesheet" href="/drafts/html-components/api-hover-button.css"> -->
<script src="/drafts/html-components/js/prefixTextForInput.js"></script>
<script src="/drafts/html-components/js/pyodide_init.js"></script>
<script src="/drafts/html-components/js/update_to_button_code.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<button id="api_float-button" onclick="openPopup()">API</button>
<!-- Overlay + Popup -->
<div id="api_hover_overlay" onclick="handleOverlayClick(event)">
    <div id="api_hover_popup">
        <div class="close-x-sticky-container">
            <button class="api_popup-close-x" onclick="closePopup()" aria-label="Close">&#x2715;</button>
        </div>
        <h2 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="making-a-plan">Enter URL</h2>
        <div id="input-wrapper">
            <!-- <span id="prefix">https://corsproxy.io/?https://api.crossref.org/</span> -->
            <input type="text" id="api_hover_raw_query_textInput" autofocus="">
        </div>
        <div id="api_hover_raw_query_popup-actions" class="_popup-actions">
            <button id="api_hover_raw_query_submit-btn" class="api_hover_submit-btn" onclick="handleSubmit(window.api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor, 'api_hover_raw_query')">Submit</button>
            <button id="api_hover_raw_query_next-page-btn" class="gray-btn" onclick="handleNextPage(window.api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor, 'api_hover_raw_query')" style="display:none;">Next Page
                →</button>
            <span id="api_hover_raw_query_page-display"
                style="display:none; font-family:monospace; font-size:14px; align-self:center; color:#555;"></span>
            <button id="close-btn" onclick="closePopup()">Close</button>
        </div>
        <div id="output-container">
            <p> URI-encoded Query: </p>
            <p id="api_hover_raw_query_uri-encoded-output" class="uri-encoded-output"></p>
        </div>
        <div id="api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor_container" style="width: 100%; height: 400px;"></div>
            <script type="module">
            import {createJSONEditor} from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vanilla-jsoneditor@3.11.0/standalone.min.js"
            
            content = null

            const api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor =createJSONEditor({
                target: document.getElementById('api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor_container'),
                props: {
                    content,
                    onChange: (updatedContent,previousContent,{contentErrors,patchResult}) => {
                        // content is an object { json: unknown } | { text: string }
                        console.log('onChange',{updatedContent,previousContent,contentErrors,patchResult})
                        content=updatedContent
                    }
                }
            })
            window.api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor = api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor
    </script>
    </div>
</div>
<script defer>
    // Apply formatter
    const input=document.getElementById('api_hover_raw_query_textInput');
    addFormatter(input,regexPrefix(/^https:\/\/corsproxy\.io\/\?https:\/\/api.crossref.org\/v1\//,'https://corsproxy.io/?https://api.crossref.org/v1/'));
</script>
<script defer>
    let nextCursor=null;
    let currentPage=1;
    let totalPages=null;

    document.getElementById("api_hover_raw_query_textInput").addEventListener("keydown",function(e) {
        if(e.key==="Enter") handleSubmit(api_hover_raw_query_jsoneditor, 'api_hover_raw_query');
        if(e.key==="Escape") closePopup();
    });
</script>
```
